Name: PCI DSS v4.0 - Vercel
Description: PCI DSS v4.0 mapping for Vercel provider checks. Vercel holds PCI-DSS v4.0 certification; these mappings assess the customer-side of Vercel's shared responsibility model.

Requirements.Name: 2.2 System Components are Configured and Managed Securely
Requirements.Description: System components are configured and managed securely to reduce vulnerabilities.

Attributes.Section: 2 - Apply Secure Configurations to All System Components

Requirements.Name: 6.4 Public-facing Web Applications are Protected Against Attacks
Requirements.Description: Public-facing web applications are protected against attacks through technical solutions.

Attributes.Section: 6 - Develop and Maintain Secure Systems and Software

Requirements.Name: 7.2 Access to System Components and Data is Appropriately Defined and Assigned
Requirements.Description: Access to system components and data is appropriately defined and assigned.

Attributes.Section: 7 - Restrict Access to System Components and Cardholder Data by Business Need to Know

Requirements.Name: 8.3 Strong Authentication for Users and Administrators is Established and Managed
Requirements.Description: Strong authentication for users and administrators is established and managed.

Attributes.Section: 8 - Identify Users and Authenticate Access to System Components

Requirements.Name: 4.2 PAN is Protected with Strong Cryptography During Transmission Over Open, Public Networks
Requirements.Description: PAN is protected with strong cryptography during transmission over open, public networks.

Attributes.Section: 4 - Protect Cardholder Data with Strong Cryptography During Transmission Over Open, Public Networks

Requirements.Name: 3.5 Primary Account Number (PAN) is Secured Wherever it is Stored
Requirements.Description: PAN is secured wherever it is stored.
